---
title: "Timothy Mulderrig"
toc: false
css: styles.css
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 17em
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/timothy-mulderrig
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/tmulderrig
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:tm639@cornell.edu


---

:::{.homepage}

# Welcome to the personal website for Timothy Mulderrig!

Tim is a PhD candidate at Cornell University in Plant Breeding and Genetics. Tim joined Dr. Mark Sorrells' Small Grains Breeding and Genetics lab in 2022 as has gained an in depth training in wheat breeding, genomics, and quantitative genetics. Tim also has declared graduate minors in International Agriculture and Rural Development as well as Plant Molecular Biology. Before his time at Cornell, Tim attended the University of Delaware, where he obtained a Honors Degree with Distinction in Plant Science, a B.A. in Biological Sciences, a B.S in Agriculture and Natural Resources and a minor in Chemistry.  

Thank you for being here! 

:::
